case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS BONILLA, CARLOS A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,300.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BONILLA, CARLOS A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BONILLA, CARLOS A.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-01-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-20-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-20-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-28-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BONILLA, CARLOS A. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. SEE CASE # 795791. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
